title: lepechinia annae
intro: Lepechinia annae, also known as Anna's lepechinia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lepechinia annae include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Lepechinia annae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
